description:
Operating Area: Corsica, French Riviera & Monaco, Provence Coast & Marseille

BABY I, 31m Sunseeker 105 yacht is a charming yacht that seduces with attractiveness and elegance. The interiors are spacious, styled in white leather and high-gloss cherry wood and 8 guests can sleep in her elegant 4 cabins. Her exteriors will sweep you off your feet: the bathing platform, teak deck with a Jacuzzi and a stunning fly bridge with ample seating, sun loungers and a whirlpool. She carries 5 crew onboard to ensure you have a relaxed luxury yacht experience.

blueprint.name: BABY I

toys.label: Donut (1x donut for 2 persons, 1x donut for 1 person)

tenders: 1 x Novurania 5.30m with 130 HP Yamaha Engine (2019)

crew.name: Franko Barac
crew.bio:
Croatian

Born and raised in Split, Croatia, Franko has been fascinated by the sea from his early childhood.
Following his career ambition to be a seafarer, he started out in the yachting industry, initially as a mechanic, working his way up through the ranks until reaching the captain’s position. He is a knowledgeable and responsible captain, always eager to fulfil the challenges of the daily life on board. Franko likes to meet new people from around and is interested in their culture and way of living. In his free time he enjoys running and hiking. With Franko being the captain, any guest can fully relax on board M/Y BABY I. He is fluent in English.

crew.name: Filip Abramovic
crew.bio:
Croatian

Chef Filip is an experienced chef who has worked in many different restaurants. He specializes in Mediterranean cuisine and loves to bring new ideas to his dishes. He has won several cooking competitions and always focuses on maintaining high standards in the kitchen. Chef Filip’s skills and passion make him a great addition to any team.

crew.name: Bozidar Drazin
crew.bio:
Croatian

Bozidar is a skilled and dedicated Chief engineer known for his excellent communication and guest service. He has a positive attitude and a wide range of experience.
He knows a lot about the Adriatic coast, its islands, underwater areas, weather, and bays.
His skills include computer use, working well under pressure, solving problems, teamwork, leadership, communication, and time management. He has worked as a chief engineer and captain on motor yachts between 30 and 48 meters long.

crew.name: Katarina Niksic
crew.bio:
Croatian

Katarina has extensive experience working on various motor yachts and gulets ranging from 20 to 51 meters. She has taken on roles as a deckhand, stewardess, and masseuse.
Katarina is communicative and always eager to please guests, ensuring they have a comfortable and enjoyable experience. She is fluent in English and knows bacis Spanish. Katarina's diverse skills, dedication, and friendly nature make her a valuable crew member onboard BABY I.

crew.name: Lucia Kardum
crew.bio:
Croatia

Cheerful, curious and open to new achievements, Lucia was naturally drawn to start her career in hospitality industry after graduating high school. Her role of 2nd stewardess requires knowledge of expert housekeeping and laundry protocols, fine dining and wine service. Lucia has the ability to easily and professionally interact with guests, providing excellent service in every aspect of their on-board experience.

With extensive experience in hospitality and a deep passion for providing exceptional customer service, Lucia is a valuable addition to M/Y BABY I crew as a 2nd stewardess.
